description_long: This cabinetry unit is a large, U-shaped kitchen installation featuring a combination of base and wall cabinets. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, likely white or off-white, with a marble or stone-look countertop spanning the work surfaces. The upper cabinets have glass-front doors, providing a view of the interior shelving, while the lower cabinets and drawers offer ample storage. There is an integrated sink basin and a cutout likely intended for a cooktop or appliance. The cabinetry includes multiple doors and drawers, each fitted with simple, linear handles. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for a residential or communal kitchen space.
description: A large, U-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with glass-front upper cabinets, marble-look countertops, and integrated sink, finished in a light color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open U-shape, glass-front upper cabinets, sink, and multiple drawers and doors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid panel sides and the depth of the cabinetry, with minimal visible hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back panels of the cabinetry, with the countertop and sink partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the solid cabinetry side and the upper cabinet structure.
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double door, single door, and glass-front doors
